items.title: Bongbong Marcos fights ill-health rumours with star jumps
items.dek: The Philippine President challenged anyone questioning his fitness to join him in the gym.
items.body: The Philippine President challenged anyone questioning his fitness to join him in the gym.

items.title: Harry and Meghan arrive in Australia for four-day tour
items.dek: It is the couple's first visit to Australia since 2018 when they were working royals.
items.body: It is the couple's first visit to Australia since 2018 when they were working royals.

items.title: ‘I don’t know why they’re coming’: Australians on Harry and Meghan's visit
items.dek: The BBC spoke to people in Sydney to hear their thoughts on the Duke and Duchess of Sussex’s trip to Australia.
items.body: The BBC spoke to people in Sydney to hear their thoughts on the Duke and Duchess of Sussex’s trip to Australia.
